# Jakir Hussain — Senior Full-Stack & AI Platform Engineer
# https://iam-hussain.site

## Identity
Name: Jakir Hussain
Role: Senior Full-Stack & AI Platform Engineer
Location: Dubai, UAE (GMT+4)
Experience: 8+ years building production AI systems and cloud-native platforms

## Specialization
- Enterprise AI platform architecture and multi-agent LLM systems
- LangChain / LangGraph orchestration for agentic workflows
- Model Context Protocol (MCP) tool integrations
- Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines with vector embeddings
- Multi-LLM routing (OpenAI, Claude, LLaMA) with governance guardrails
- Full-stack engineering: Node.js, TypeScript, React, Next.js, GraphQL
- Cloud-native infrastructure: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform

## Featured Work
1. Enterprise AI Platform — Emirates NBD: Centralized AI development platform with multi-agent orchestration, shared AI SDKs, MCP-based integrations, and enterprise governance guardrails for regulated banking.
2. Treasury AI Copilot — Emirates NBD: Multi-agent LLM system with LangGraph orchestration, RAG pipelines, MCP-secured Calypso API integration, Redis session memory, and multi-LLM routing for real-time treasury insights.
3. AI Personalization Engine — The New Yorker (Condé Nast): ML-driven recommendation platform boosting engagement by 27%, with server-driven UI architecture and Kubernetes-based content ingestion.
4. Open Finance Platform — Emirates NBD: Backend architecture for UAE Central Bank Open Banking framework — Node.js microservices, GraphQL APIs, automated CI/CD cutting release cycles by 40%.

## Technical Skills
AI/LLM: LangChain, LangGraph, MCP, RAG, Vector Embeddings, Multi-Agent Systems, Prompt Engineering, AI Guardrails, OpenAI API, Claude, LLaMA
Backend: Node.js, TypeScript, Express.js, GraphQL, Apollo, Prisma, REST APIs
Frontend: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
Data: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, DynamoDB, Elasticsearch
Cloud: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, GitHub Actions, Jenkins
